title: WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: The Wildlife Institute of India (WII) has published the Scientific Consultant Grade – I Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 position. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding a Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science, Zoology, Ecology, Environmental Sciences, Geoinformatics, Life Sciences) or equivalent subjects, or BE/B.Tech in an equivalent subject with 5–10 years of relevant experience are eligible to apply online at https://www.wii.gov.in. The application process will be active from 20 May 2026 to 03 June 2026, and candidates can easily

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: up to 5 years OBC: up to 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science/ Zoology/ Ecology/ Environmental Sciences/ Geoinformatics/ Life Sciences) or equivalent subjects from a recognized institute/University or BE/B Tech in equivalent subject with Five – Ten years of experience.
qualification.details: Scientific Consultant Grade - I: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science/ Zoology/ Ecology/ Environmental Sciences/ Geoinformatics/ Life Sciences) or equivalent subjects from a recognized institute/ University or BE/B Tech in equivalent subject and Five – Ten years of experience.

salary_details.details: Scientific Consultant Grade - I: Rs. 90,000/- (Consolidated) per month

selection_process: Online interview Verification of original documents
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WII to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I post is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientific Consultant Grade – I position?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science/ Zoology/ Ecology/ Environmental Sciences/ Geoinformatics/ Life Sciences) or equivalent, or a BE/B Tech with five to ten years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Scientific Consultant Grade – I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 90,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the WII recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General category candidates and Rs. 100/- for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PC candidates as an application processing fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an online interview followed by the verification of original documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type is mentioned as Contract in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is online. Candidates need to submit their applications through the specified online portal.

faq.question: Q10. What documents need to be uploaded during the online application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to upload scanned copies of certificates related to Educational Qualification, Marksheets, Work Experience, Reserved Category, UGC/CSIR NET, Publications, Application Processing Fee Receipt, Passport Size Photo, and Digital signature.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I post is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.
